headline: SpaceX gets $4 billion contract to build missile-tracking ‘Golden Dome’ satellites
summary: SpaceX secures a $4.16 billion Pentagon contract. The deal is to build missile-tracking satellites for the "Golden Dome" defense system. These satellites will enhance space-based target detection and tracking capabilities.

headline: Acer’s launching a Linux handheld for streaming your PC games
summary: Acer announces the Nitro Blaze Link, a Linux-based streaming handheld. Designed as a "streaming-first" companion for PC gaming, not a Steam Deck competitor. Features a 7-inch display, Wi-Fi 6, and launches Q4 2026.

headline: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
summary: AI training startup Shift offers free home cleaning services. The catch: clients must allow footage of their homes for AI training data. Shift plans to expand its controversial service from New York to other cities like London.

headline: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
summary: The Verge offers a gift guide for 2026 high school graduates. Suggests gifts to help graduates transition into careers or college. Focuses on tech and gadgets to support their new responsibilities.

headline: New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip drops to all-time low price.
summary: The new 2026 Apple iPad Air featuring the M4 chip is now at its lowest price ever. Shoppers can save $80 compared to purchasing directly from Apple. This limited-time deal is available in May.

headline: Wayfair Memorial Day sale offers huge discount on power lift recliner.
summary: A high-end power lift recliner and massage chair is drastically reduced. Originally $1,800, it's now just $385 during Wayfair's Memorial Day Sale. This massive discount makes it an attractive Father's Day gift option.

headline: Exclusive Interview: How Music Shaped Zenless Zone Zero.
summary: An exclusive interview explores the musical creation of Zenless Zone Zero. Music Director Yang Wutao discusses Sān-Z Studio's soundtrack development. Reveals how music profoundly shaped HoYoverse's new IP.

headline: New book reveals Spielberg's abandoned alien horror film that became E.T.
summary: "Stranded on Earth" will detail Steven Spielberg's unmade horror movie. The film, "Night Skies," was an alien horror project. It eventually evolved into the beloved classic, E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.

headline: 'Poison seller' admits aiding suicides with online chemical sales.
summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges for selling toxic chemicals online globally. He confessed to aiding suicides involving Canadian victims. Families demand charges in the UK over 79 British deaths linked to his sales.

headline: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian block.
summary: Nato and the EU condemn Russia after a drone strike hit a Romanian residential block. Romania states the drone was likely hit over Ukraine, altering its trajectory. The incident escalates tensions, drawing international condemnation.

headline: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans.
summary: A Blue Origin rocket exploded, causing a significant setback. This incident impacts Blue Origin's space endeavors. The failure raises concerns and delays for NASA's lunar exploration plans.

headline: Child among three dead in tower block fall in Elephant and Castle.
summary: A tragic incident resulted in three fatalities, including a child. A man, woman, and child died after falling from a tower block. The deaths occurred at the scene in Elephant and Castle.
